item.title: The 94th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dump
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild each Mon - Thu between 11am and Noon EST, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's new "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
No, I don't actually call them MeeMays, OR DO I?!?!
Ken M is a National Treasure
#Dump #Meme_Dump #Phone_Dump #AncientMemes #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #EatingAppsTakingNaps #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #EatNamesAndTakeAss #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #HitlerAteBigBagsOfDicks #IfYoureDeadInside #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten (DK Dump) @CodyBurkett (Pippin) @AbbiiStabbii (Images Of Note) @DigiT00l @DumpsterKoala @OhValleyOfPlenty @CeleryMan7 Vol. 1 https://imgur.com/gallery/MKoxsC0 Vol. 2 https://imgur.com/gallery/LuT8Tjh Vol. 3 https://imgur.com/gallery/DwYKbXW Vol. 4 https://imgur.com/gallery/hAKeS7B Vol. 5 https://imgur.com/gallery/sn3GPn1 Vol. 6 https://imgur.com/gallery/X14rMhq Vol. 7 https://imgur.com/gallery/8TycbEB Vol. 8 https://imgur.com/gallery/DUpO8AW Vol. 9 https://imgur.com/gallery/KJJgDnc Vol 10 https://imgur.com/gallery/6nAbX3Z Vol 11 https://imgur.com/gallery/HQcMJFS - Food Vol 12 https://imgur.com/gallery/2MGl5x9 - Dinos and Bears Vol 13 https://imgur.com/gallery/oT6pcnU - Therapy Vol 14 https://imgur.com/gallery/YgRk6Es - BMD (Big Mood Disorder) Vol 15 https://imgur.com/gallery/qiK2WtQ - MATURE Vol 16 https://imgur.com/gallery/p51V73n Vol 17 https://imgur.com/gallery/U1zD3DK Vol 18 https://imgur.com/gallery/k7heWWP Vol 19 https://imgur.com/gallery/H9apiBi Vol 20 https://imgur.com/gallery/amPEj5N Vol 21 https://imgur.com/gallery/56sAniX Vol 22 https://imgur.com/gallery/TMQHwkY Vol 23 https://imgur.com/gallery/BCWxyxy Vol 24 https://imgur.com/gallery/C23H9gk Vol 25 https://imgur.com/gallery/rWRckHP Vol 26 https://imgur.com/gallery/hJYgHKM Vol 27 https://imgur.com/gallery/TE5h7Kc Vol 28 https://imgur.com/gallery/0KQqqQ9 Vol 29 https://imgur.com/gallery/wsxJ2x4 Vol 30 https://imgur.com/gallery/NuOQleO - This list is getting long as AF f•ck to TBH honest --- After this Dump I'll start cutting the link list down to the last 50ish Dumperoos.

item.dc:creator: TheRainbowegoSweet007

item.title: Y'all got some 'splainin to do.
item.description:
https://www.vox.com/policy-and-politics/23021104/texas-abortion-murder-charge-starr-county
It's really incredible that the charges - which were such a brazen overreach in the first place - were dropped in the manner they were, on Sunday. They were originally planning a press conference for Monday, to further explain the indictment. I expected her lawyers to be good, but - what the hell happened? Edit: I'm a former healthcare compliance officer - I hate to be the bearer of bad news, but this case isn't a HIPAA violation. I know it feels like it *should* be, but there is a specific carve-out in the law that allows medical personnel to disclose records to law enforcement. This case is an example of how that gets abused. Talk to your representatives about changing it.
item.dc:creator: ButtersTheCat

item.title: White Privilege Strikes Again **CW: Sexual Assault**
item.description: Rapist Bowen Turner was out on bond for rape when he raped another young woman. Then Bowen Turner, the rapist, violated his bond from his second rape by going to restaurants, friend’s houses, and to the golf course 19 times. Nothing was done to rapist Bowen Turner for violating his bond. Then, the bow tie wearing smashed pastry looking motherfucker of a judge sentenced him to PROBATION for rape and he won’t have to register as the sex offender he is as long as he doesn’t violate his parole. Call me pessimistic, but I don’t think that holds much water since he was let off the hook — repeatedly — when he violated his bond. Oh, and his first {known} victim, Dallas Stoller, passed away last November so they just… dismissed that case since she wouldn’t be able to testify. The United States legal system is working exactly how it’s supposed to be and it’s FUCKED. As long as you’re a rich, popular, white male with a family reputation (and apparently the name B. Turner), then you are above the law. Article: https://thetandd.com/news/local/crime-and-courts/man-19-guilty-in-assault-probation-sentence-leads-parents-to-question-justice/article_657ac3d4-0aa3-52db-9630-2dcc1aa3bf90.html

item.title: Probably shouldn’t be touching that.
item.description: Also known as the blue dragon, sea swallow or blue angel, the blue glaucus is a species of brightly colored sea slug (nudibranch), and can be found throughout the Atlantic, Pacific and Indian Oceans in temperate and tropical waters. Like most nudibranchs, this species incorporates toxic chemicals or stinging cells from its prey into its own skin.
item.dc:creator: BluesFish

item.title: On the 10th of April, 1944, Odesa was liberated from Nazi invaders. Now, exactly 78 years later, Odesa is getting ready to defend itself from genocidal invaders yet again
item.description: Ukrainian refugees in Antalya, Turkey started cleaning up dirty places as a thank you.

item.title: REST IN PEACE: Mimi Reinhard, the secretary who typed up the list of Jews saved by Oskar Schindler during WWII, died Friday. She was 107 years old!

item.title: this is my dog Lila and I love her very much
item.description:
she is about twelve human years old meaning she is very old
she's very funny and likes to talk a lot not in barking but a cross between howling and growling in a friendly manor
she did have a sister names Lexi but one day she couldnt move and I came home from school to find out she died. Lila went through a few months of looking around the house anxiously to find Lexi but she eventually knew she was gone. Lila still follows rules Lexi enforced as the dominant dog in the house.
item.dc:creator: DancinShober666

item.title: Obvious repost from five years ago. By ME no less. Can I get away with it it!?
item.dc:creator: Potenze

item.title: Amazing Japanese food I got to enjoy
item.description:
Going through some photos of my trip to Japan in 2017 and some of these delicious foods made me miss Japan, so wanted to share. This first treat was an apple creme brulee crepe in Harajuku - so rich but 10/10 would get again!
A beautiful tempura lunch set at a soba restaurant in Kamakura. There was a DIY dipping sauce that you could mix the shredded spring onion, wasabi and sauce to your taste.
Osaka style okonomiyaki, with pork belly. While Hiroshima style is tasty, this was the style I was introduced to first, so where my mind will always go back to.
Gyoza are one of my favourite treats and enjoy making them at home too. This was from a really popular store Dotonbori, Osaka
Stayed in a ryokan in a smaller fishing village and this was the breakfast served. Black bowl I think was a mix of radish and small bait fish, and only partly seen in the top left was a rehydrated fish heating over a small flame.
A Koiking (Magikarp) shaped taiyaki from Akihabara area, just off the main shopping area.
Best part was getting to watch fresh ones cooked while you munched on your own. These ones here were a chocolate custard filling (as was my Koiking) I really miss all the amazing snacks and dishes from Japan, so hopefully I can get back there soon enough!
item.dc:creator: parkydiver
